info: Your weapon gains 5% PEN. Landing hits with your weapon applies stacks of Cauterize, increasing the incoming PEN your opponent takes by (LHT: 5.45%, MED: 8%, HVY: 10%) per stack. Cauterized caps at +40% incoming PEN. Cauterize's PEN bonus is applied to all damage sources like Mantras. Sear does not bypass the 50% PEN cap. Additionally, drain your opponent's thirst equal to 20% of your weapon's scaled damage. Sear stacks lasts 15 seconds each. Applying a new stack does not refresh this timer.
name: Sear
in_game_desc: Weapon gains +5% PEN. Applies Cauterize on hit for 15s, as well as draining their Water. Cauterized foes take more PEN the more stacks are applied.
